riskFloorReasons: migration / fleet-rollout surface: src/core/PostUpdateMigrator.ts touches PostUpdateMigrator (fleet migration machinery)

causalAutopsy.notes: Not a prior-PR regression. The agent's own .instar runtime data (telegram-images, server-data SQLite, logs, state) has been indexed by macOS Spotlight + analyzed by mediaanalysisd since agents began writing it. The prior Spotlight-exclusion PRs (#588 worktrees, #606 node_modules, #903 Claude transcripts) progressively closed the largest known trees but never extended to the agent's own data dir, which 2026-06-06 grounding (ps/uptime census during Justin's load-average-30 resource investigation) showed was the live mediaanalysisd (~72-78% CPU, analyzing telegram-images) + mds_stores (~28-48%, re-indexing server-data WAL) fuel. This closes that latent gap by reusing the same marker mechanism. Fix in the resource-efficiency initiative; the immediate machine relief was a manual ~/.instar marker, this is the durable fleet-wide code fix.
